notes: Search pagination is page_number (param: page) with items_per_page in {24, 48, 96} (default 48). /search products live at data.products[]; total_pages reported in data.total_pages. Either query OR manufacturer_id required for /search. /product-details and /product-reviews require sku. /product-reviews is paginated (10 per page) and includes an AI summary + aspect sentiments. rapidapi_host is best-effort (no '1' suffix) — VERIFY against the live RapidAPI listing before relying on it for RAPIDAPI_KEY calls; OWN ak_ keys route via slug 'real-time-wayfair-data' and are unaffected.
